15: package versioned

17: import (
18: 	"fmt"
19: 
20: 	runtimev1alpha1 "github.com/volcano-sh/agent/client-go/clientset/versioned/typed/runtime/v1alpha1"
21: 	discovery "k8s.io/client-go/discovery"
22: 	rest "k8s.io/client-go/rest"
23: 	flowcontrol "k8s.io/client-go/util/flowcontrol"
24: )
25: 
26: type Interface interface {
27: 	Discovery() discovery.DiscoveryInterface
28: 	RuntimeV1alpha1() runtimev1alpha1.RuntimeV1alpha1Interface
29: }
30: 
31: type Clientset struct {
32: 	*discovery.DiscoveryClient
33: 	runtimeV1alpha1 *runtimev1alpha1.RuntimeV1alpha1Client
34: }
35: 
36: func (c *Clientset) RuntimeV1alpha1() runtimev1alpha1.RuntimeV1alpha1Interface {
37: 	return c.runtimeV1alpha1
38: }
39: 
40: func (c *Clientset) Discovery() discovery.DiscoveryInterface {
41: 	if c == nil {
42: 		return nil
43: 	}
44: 	return c.DiscoveryClient
45: }
46: 
47: func NewForConfig(c *rest.Config) (*Clientset, error) {
48: 	configShallowCopy := *c
49: 	if configShallowCopy.RateLimiter == nil && configShallowCopy.QPS > 0 {
50: 		if configShallowCopy.Burst <= 0 {
51: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("burst is required to be greater than 0 when QPS is set to greater than 0")
52: 		}
53: 		configShallowCopy.RateLimiter = flowcontrol.NewTokenBucketRateLimiter(configShallowCopy.QPS, configShallowCopy.Burst)
54: 	}
55: 	var cs Clientset
56: 	var err error
57: 	cs.runtimeV1alpha1, err = runtimev1alpha1.NewForConfig(&configShallowCopy)
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		return nil, err
60: 	}
61: 	cs.DiscoveryClient, err = discovery.NewDiscoveryClientForConfig(&configShallowCopy)
62: 	if err != nil {
63: 		return nil, err
64: 	}
65: 	return &cs, nil
66: }
67: 
68: func NewForConfigOrDie(c *rest.Config) *Clientset {
69: 	var cs Clientset
70: 	cs.runtimeV1alpha1 = runtimev1alpha1.NewForConfigOrDie(c)
71: 	cs.DiscoveryClient = discovery.NewDiscoveryClientForConfigOrDie(c)
72: 	return &cs
73: }
74: 
75: func New(c rest.Interface) *Clientset {
76: 	var cs Clientset
77: 	cs.runtimeV1alpha1 = runtimev1alpha1.New(c)
78: 	cs.DiscoveryClient = discovery.NewDiscoveryClient(c)
79: 	return &cs
80: }

<content>1: // Copyright The Volcano Authors.
2: //

12: // See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
13: // limitations under the License.
14: 
15: package agentd
16: 
17: import (
18: 	"context"
19: 	"time"
20: 
21: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
22: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
23: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
24: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
25: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
26: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
27: )
28: 
29: const (
30: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
31: 	SessionExpirationTimeout  = 15 * time.Minute
32: 	ParseErrorRequeueDuration = 30 * time.Second
33: )
34: 
35: type SandboxReconciler struct {
36: 	client.Client
37: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
38: }
39: 
40: func (r *SandboxReconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
41: 	log := klog.FromContext(ctx).WithValues("sandbox", klog.KRef(req.Namespace, req.Name))
42: 	log.V(4).Info("Reconciling Sandbox")
43: 
44: 	var sandbox sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox
45: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, &sandbox); err != nil {
46: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
47: 			log.V(4).Info("Sandbox not found, returning")
48: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
49: 		}
50: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to get Sandbox")
51: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
52: 	}
53: 
54: 	annotationValue := sandbox.GetAnnotations()[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
55: 	if annotationValue == "" {
56: 		log.V(4).Info("No last-activity-time annotation, skipping")
57: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, annotationValue)
61: 	if err != nil {
62: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to parse last-activity-time annotation", "value", annotationValue)
63: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: ParseErrorRequeueDuration}, err
64: 	}
65: 
66: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
67: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
68: 		log.Info("Sandbox expired, deleting", "lastActivity", lastActivity, "expirationTime", expirationTime)
69: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, &sandbox); err != nil {
70: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
71: 				log.V(4).Info("Sandbox already deleted")
72: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
73: 			}
74: 			log.Error(err, "Failed to delete Sandbox")
75: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
76: 		}
77: 		log.Info("Sandbox deleted successfully")
78: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
79: 	}
80: 
81: 	requeueAfter := time.Until(expirationTime)
82: 	log.V(4).Info("Sandbox not yet expired, requeuing", "requeueAfter", requeueAfter, "expirationTime", expirationTime)
83: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueAfter}, nil
84: }
85: 
86: func (r *SandboxReconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
87: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
88: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
89: 		Complete(r)
90: }

(End of file - total 90 lines)
</content>

15: package main
16: 
17: import (
18: 	"os"
19: 
20: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
21: 	utilruntime "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/runtime"
22: 	clientgoscheme "k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/scheme"
23: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
24: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
25: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
26: 	metricsserver "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/metrics/server"
27: 
28: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/agentd"
29: )
30: 
31: var (
32: 	scheme = runtime.NewScheme()
33: )
34: 
35: func init() {
36: 	utilruntime.Must(clientgoscheme.AddToScheme(scheme))
37: 	utilruntime.Must(sandboxv1alpha1.AddToScheme(scheme))
38: }
39: 
40: func main() {
41: 	setupLog := klog.Background()
42: 
43: 	mgr, err := ctrl.NewManager(ctrl.GetConfigOrDie(), ctrl.Options{
44: 		Scheme:                 scheme,
45: 		Metrics:                metricsserver.Options{BindAddress: "0"},
46: 		HealthProbeBindAddress: "0",
47: 	})
48: 	if err != nil {
49: 		setupLog.Error(err, "Failed to create manager")
50: 		os.Exit(1)
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	if err := (&agentd.SandboxReconciler{
54: 		Client: mgr.GetClient(),
55: 		Scheme: mgr.GetScheme(),
56: 	}).SetupWithManager(mgr); err != nil {
57: 		setupLog.Error(err, "Failed to setup controller")
58: 		os.Exit(1)
59: 	}
60: 
61: 	setupLog.Info("Starting manager")
62: 	if err := mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler()); err != nil {
63: 		setupLog.Error(err, "Failed to start manager")
64: 		os.Exit(1)
65: 	}
66: }

58: type K8sClient struct {
59: 	config     *rest.Config

61: 	dynamicCli dynamic.Interface
62: 	namespace  string
63: }
64: 
65: func NewK8sClient(kubeconfig, masterURL string) (*K8sClient, error) {
66: 	config, err := buildConfig(kubeconfig, masterURL)
67: 	if err != nil {
68: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to build config: %w", err)
69: 	}
70: 
71: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(config)
72: 	if err != nil {
73: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create clientset: %w", err)
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	dynamicCli, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(config)
77: 	if err != nil {
78: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create dynamic client: %w", err)
79: 	}
80: 
81: 	return &K8sClient{
82: 		config:     config,
83: 		clientset:  clientset,
84: 		dynamicCli: dynamicCli,
85: 		namespace:  "default",
86: 	}, nil
87: }
88: 
89: func buildConfig(kubeconfig, masterURL string) (*rest.Config, error) {
90: 	if kubeconfig != "" {
91: 		return clientcmd.BuildConfigFromFlags(masterURL, kubeconfig)
92: 	}
93: 	return rest.InClusterConfig()
94: }

96: func (c *K8sClient) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
97: 	_, err := c.clientset.Discovery().ServerVersion()
98: 	if err != nil {
99: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to connect to Kubernetes API: %w", err)
100: 	}
101: 	klog.InfoS("Successfully connected to Kubernetes API")
102: 	return nil
103: }

115: }

119: }

122: 	return c.dynamicCli.Resource(SandboxGVR).Namespace(namespace).Delete(ctx, name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
123: }
124: 
125: func (c *K8sClient) ListSandboxesByLabel(ctx context.Context, namespace, labelSelector string) ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
126: 	list, err := c.dynamicCli.Resource(SandboxGVR).Namespace(namespace).List(ctx, metav1.ListOptions{
127: 		LabelSelector: labelSelector,
128: 	})
129: 	if err != nil {
130: 		return nil, err
131: 	}
132: 
133: 	items := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(list.Items))
134: 	for _, item := range list.Items {
135: 		items = append(items, item.Object)
136: 	}
137: 	return items, nil
138: }
139: 
140: func (c *K8sClient) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (map[string]interface{}, error) {
141: 	labelSelector := fmt.Sprintf("%s=%s", SessionIdLabelKey, sessionID)
142: 	list, err := c.dynamicCli.Resource(SandboxGVR).List(ctx, metav1.ListOptions{
143: 		LabelSelector: labelSelector,
144: 	})
145: 	if err != nil {
146: 		return nil, err
147: 	}
148: 
149: 	if len(list.Items) == 0 {
150: 		return nil, nil
151: 	}
152: 
153: 	return list.Items[0].Object, nil
154: }
155: 
156: func (c *K8sClient) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time) ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
157: 	annotationSelector := fields.OneTermEqualSelector(metav1.ObjectNameField, "").String()
158: 	list, err := c.dynamicCli.Resource(SandboxGVR).List(ctx, metav1.ListOptions{
159: 		FieldSelector: annotationSelector,
160: 	})
161: 	if err != nil {
162: 		return nil, err
163: 	}
164: 
165: 	items := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0)
166: 	for _, item := range list.Items {
167: 		annotations := item.GetAnnotations()
168: 		if annotations == nil {
169: 			continue
170: 		}
171: 		expiresAtStr, ok := annotations[ExpiresAtAnnotationKey]
172: 		if !ok {
173: 			continue
174: 		}
175: 		expiresAt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, expiresAtStr)
176: 		if err != nil {
177: 			continue
178: 		}
179: 		if expiresAt.Before(before) {
180: 			items = append(items, item.Object)
181: 		}
182: 	}
183: 	return items, nil
184: }

187: 	return c.dynamicCli.Resource(schema.GroupVersionResource{

202: func (c *K8sClient) ValidateToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (string, error) {
203: 	review := map[string]interface{}{
204: 		"apiVersion": "authentication.k8s.io/v1",
205: 		"kind":       "TokenReview",
206: 		"spec": map[string]interface{}{
207: 			"token": token,
208: 		},
209: 	}
210: 
211: 	result, err := c.clientset.Discovery().RESTClient().Post().
212: 		AbsPath("/apis/authentication.k8s.io/v1/tokenreviews").
213: 		Body(review).
214: 		DoRaw(ctx)
215: 	if err != nil {
216: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("token review failed: %w", err)
217: 	}
218: 
219: 	klog.V(4).InfoS("Token review result", "result", string(result))
220: 	return string(result), nil
221: }

32: func (s *Server) handleHealth(c *gin.Context) {
33: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
34: 		"status":    "healthy",
35: 		"startTime": s.startTime.Format(time.RFC3339),
36: 	})
37: }
38: 
39: func (s *Server) handleAgentRuntimeCreate(c *gin.Context) {
40: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
41: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
42: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
43: 		return
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
47: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
48: 		return
49: 	}
50: 
51: 	if req.Kind != types.AgentRuntimeKind {
52: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid kind, expected AgentRuntime"})
53: 		return
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	sessionID := uuid.New().String()
57: 	ctx := c.Request.Context()
58: 
59: 	sandboxInfo, err := s.buildSandboxForAgentRuntime(ctx, &req, sessionID)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to build sandbox for AgentRuntime", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
62: 		if apiErr, ok := err.(api.APIStatus); ok {
63: 			c.JSON(int(apiErr.Status().Code), gin.H{"error": apiErr.Status().Message})
64: 			return
65: 		}
66: 		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
67: 		return
68: 	}
69: 
70: 	resp := &types.CreateSandboxResponse{
71: 		SessionID:   sandboxInfo.SessionID,
72: 		SandboxID:   sandboxInfo.SandboxID,
73: 		SandboxName: sandboxInfo.Name,
74: 		EntryPoints: sandboxInfo.EntryPoints,
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
78: }
79: 
80: func (s *Server) handleCodeInterpreterCreate(c *gin.Context) {
81: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
82: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
83: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
84: 		return
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
88: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
89: 		return
90: 	}
91: 
92: 	if req.Kind != types.CodeInterpreterKind {
93: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid kind, expected CodeInterpreter"})
94: 		return
95: 	}
96: 
97: 	sessionID := uuid.New().String()
98: 	ctx := c.Request.Context()
99: 
100: 	sandboxInfo, err := s.buildSandboxForCodeInterpreter(ctx, &req, sessionID)
101: 	if err != nil {
102: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to build sandbox for CodeInterpreter", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
103: 		if apiErr, ok := err.(api.APIStatus); ok {
104: 			c.JSON(int(apiErr.Status().Code), gin.H{"error": apiErr.Status().Message})
105: 			return
106: 		}
107: 		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
108: 		return
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	resp := &types.CreateSandboxResponse{
112: 		SessionID:   sandboxInfo.SessionID,
113: 		SandboxID:   sandboxInfo.SandboxID,
114: 		SandboxName: sandboxInfo.Name,
115: 		EntryPoints: sandboxInfo.EntryPoints,
116: 	}
117: 
118: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
119: }
120: 
121: func (s *Server) handleDeleteSandbox(c *gin.Context) {
122: 	sessionID := c.Param("sessionId")
123: 	if sessionID == "" {
124: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "session id is required"})
125: 		return
126: 	}
127: 
128: 	ctx := c.Request.Context()
129: 
130: 	if err := s.deleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID); err != nil {
131: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to delete sandbox", "sessionID", sessionID)
132: 		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
133: 		return
134: 	}
135: 
136: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
137: 		"status":    "deleted",
138: 		"sessionId": sessionID,
139: 	})
140: }
141: 
142: func (s *Server) deleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
143: 	sandbox, err := s.k8sClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
144: 	if err != nil {
145: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get sandbox: %w", err)
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	if sandbox == nil {
149: 		return nil
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	return s.k8sClient.DeleteSandbox(ctx, sandbox.Namespace, sandbox.Name)
153: }
154: 
155: func respondWithError(c *gin.Context, code int, message string) {
156: 	c.JSON(code, gin.H{"error": message})
157: }
158: 
159: func respondWithAPIError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
160: 	if apiErr, ok := err.(api.APIStatus); ok {
161: 		c.JSON(int(apiErr.Status().Code), gin.H{
162: 			"error":  apiErr.Status().Message,
163: 			"reason": apiErr.Status().Reason,
164: 		})
165: 		return
166: 	}
167: 	c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
168: }
169: 
170: func toJSON(v interface{}) string {

172: 	return string(b)

157: func (c *K8sClient) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time) ([]map[string]interface{}, error) {
158: 	annotationSelector := fields.OneTermEqualSelector(metav1.ObjectNameField, "").String()
159: 	list, err := c.dynamicCli.Resource(SandboxGVR).List(ctx, metav1.ListOptions{
160: 		FieldSelector: annotationSelector,
161: 	})
162: 	if err != nil {
163: 		return nil, err
164: 	}
165: 
166: 	items := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0)
167: 	for _, item := range list.Items {
168: 		annotations := item.GetAnnotations()
169: 		if annotations == nil {
170: 			continue
171: 		}
172: 		expiresAtStr, ok := annotations[ExpiresAtAnnotationKey]
173: 		if !ok {
174: 			continue
175: 		}
176: 		expiresAt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, expiresAtStr)
177: 		if err != nil {
178: 			continue
179: 		}
180: 		if expiresAt.Before(before) {
181: 			items = append(items, item.Object)
182: 		}
183: 	}
184: 	return items, nil
185: }

15: package workloadmanager
16: 
17: import (
18: 	"context"
19: 	"time"
20: 
21: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
22: )
23: 
24: type GarbageCollector struct {
25: 	k8sClient *K8sClient
26: 	interval  time.Duration
27: 	stopCh    chan struct{}
28: }
29: 
30: func NewGarbageCollector(k8sClient *K8sClient, interval time.Duration) *GarbageCollector {
31: 	if interval <= 0 {
32: 		interval = 15 * time.Second
33: 	}
34: 	return &GarbageCollector{
35: 		k8sClient: k8sClient,
36: 		interval:  interval,
37: 		stopCh:    make(chan struct{}),
38: 	}
39: }
40: 
41: func (gc *GarbageCollector) Start(ctx context.Context) {
42: 	klog.InfoS("Starting garbage collector", "interval", gc.interval)
43: 
44: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(gc.interval)
45: 	defer ticker.Stop()
46: 
47: 	for {
48: 		select {
49: 		case <-ticker.C:
50: 			gc.run(ctx)
51: 		case <-gc.stopCh:
52: 			klog.InfoS("Stopping garbage collector")
53: 			return
54: 		case <-ctx.Done():
55: 			klog.InfoS("Garbage collector context done")
56: 			return
57: 		}
58: 	}
59: }
60: 
61: func (gc *GarbageCollector) Stop() {
62: 	close(gc.stopCh)
63: }
64: 
65: func (gc *GarbageCollector) run(ctx context.Context) {
66: 	klog.V(4).InfoS("Running garbage collection")
67: 
68: 	gc.cleanupExpiredSandboxes(ctx)
69: 	gc.cleanupInactiveSandboxes(ctx)
70: }
71: 
72: func (gc *GarbageCollector) cleanupExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context) {
73: 	sandboxes, err := gc.k8sClient.ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, time.Now())
74: 	if err != nil {
75: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to list expired sandboxes")
76: 		return
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	for _, sandbox := range sandboxes {
80: 		name := sandbox["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["name"].(string)
81: 		namespace := sandbox["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["namespace"].(string)
82: 
83: 		if err := gc.k8sClient.DeleteSandbox(ctx, namespace, name); err != nil {
84: 			klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to delete expired sandbox", "namespace", namespace, "name", name)
85: 			continue
86: 		}
87: 
88: 		klog.InfoS("Deleted expired sandbox", "namespace", namespace, "name", name)
89: 	}
90: }
91: 
92: func (gc *GarbageCollector) cleanupInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context) {
93: 	sandboxes, err := gc.k8sClient.ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, time.Now())
94: 	if err != nil {
95: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to list inactive sandboxes")
96: 		return
97: 	}
98: 
99: 	for _, sandbox := range sandboxes {
100: 		annotations, ok := sandbox["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["annotations"].(map[string]interface{})
101: 		if !ok {
102: 			continue
103: 		}
104: 
105: 		lastActivityStr, ok := annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey].(string)
106: 		if !ok {
107: 			continue
108: 		}
109: 
110: 		lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
111: 		if err != nil {
112: 			continue
113: 		}
114: 
115: 		idleTimeoutStr, ok := annotations[IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey].(string)
116: 		if !ok {
117: 			idleTimeoutStr = DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout.String()
118: 		}
119: 
120: 		idleTimeout, err := time.ParseDuration(idleTimeoutStr)
121: 		if err != nil {
122: 			idleTimeout = DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout
123: 		}
124: 
125: 		if time.Since(lastActivity) > idleTimeout {
126: 			name := sandbox["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["name"].(string)
127: 			namespace := sandbox["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["namespace"].(string)
128: 
129: 			if err := gc.k8sClient.DeleteSandbox(ctx, namespace, name); err != nil {
130: 				klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to delete inactive sandbox", "namespace", namespace, "name", name)
131: 				continue
132: 			}
133: 
134: 			klog.InfoS("Deleted inactive sandbox", "namespace", namespace, "name", name)
135: 		}
136: 	}
137: }

31: func (s *Server) buildSandboxForAgentRuntime(ctx context.Context, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
32: 	agentRuntime, err := s.k8sClient.GetAgentRuntime(ctx, req.Namespace, req.Name)
33: 	if err != nil {
34: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to get AgentRuntime", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
35: 		return nil, api.NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(req.Namespace, req.Name, types.AgentRuntimeKind)
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	sandboxName := generateSandboxName(sessionID)
39: 	sandbox := buildSandboxObject(sandboxName, req.Namespace, sessionID, req.Name, types.AgentRuntimeKind)
40: 
41: 	template, ok := agentRuntime["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["podTemplate"].(map[string]interface{})
42: 	if !ok {
43: 		return nil, api.ErrTemplateMissing
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	if err := applyTemplateToSandbox(sandbox, template); err != nil {
47: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to apply template: %w", err)
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	labels := sandbox.GetLabels()
51: 	if labels == nil {
52: 		labels = make(map[string]string)
53: 	}
54: 	labels[SessionIdLabelKey] = sessionID
55: 	labels[WorkloadNameLabelKey] = req.Name
56: 	labels[WorkloadNamespaceLabelKey] = req.Namespace
57: 	labels[WorkloadKindLabelKey] = types.AgentRuntimeKind
58: 	sandbox.SetLabels(labels)
59: 
60: 	annotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
61: 	if annotations == nil {
62: 		annotations = make(map[string]string)
63: 	}
64: 	now := time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
65: 	annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey] = now
66: 
67: 	sessionTimeout := DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout
68: 	if timeout, ok := agentRuntime["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["sessionTimeout"].(string); ok && timeout != "" {
69: 		if d, err := time.ParseDuration(timeout); err == nil {
70: 			sessionTimeout = d
71: 		}
72: 	}
73: 	annotations[IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey] = sessionTimeout.String()
74: 
75: 	expiresAt := time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL)
76: 	annotations[ExpiresAtAnnotationKey] = expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339)
77: 	sandbox.SetAnnotations(annotations)
78: 
79: 	created, err := s.k8sClient.CreateSandbox(ctx, req.Namespace, sandbox.Object)
80: 	if err != nil {
81: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create sandbox: %w", err)
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	klog.InfoS("Created sandbox for AgentRuntime", "sandbox", sandboxName, "sessionID", sessionID)
85: 
86: 	sandboxID := ""
87: 	if uid, ok := created["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["uid"].(string); ok {
88: 		sandboxID = uid
89: 	}
90: 
91: 	entryPoints := extractEntryPoints(agentRuntime)
92: 
93: 	return &types.SandboxInfo{
94: 		Kind:             types.AgentRuntimeKind,
95: 		SandboxID:        sandboxID,
96: 		SandboxNamespace: req.Namespace,
97: 		Name:             sandboxName,
98: 		EntryPoints:      entryPoints,
99: 		SessionID:        sessionID,
100: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
101: 		ExpiresAt:        expiresAt,
102: 		Status:           "Pending",
103: 	}, nil
104: }
105: 
106: func (s *Server) buildSandboxForCodeInterpreter(ctx context.Context, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
107: 	codeInterpreter, err := s.k8sClient.GetCodeInterpreter(ctx, req.Namespace, req.Name)
108: 	if err != nil {
109: 		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to get CodeInterpreter", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
110: 		return nil, api.NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(req.Namespace, req.Name, types.CodeInterpreterKind)
111: 	}
112: 
113: 	sandboxName := generateSandboxName(sessionID)
114: 	sandbox := buildSandboxObject(sandboxName, req.Namespace, sessionID, req.Name, types.CodeInterpreterKind)
115: 
116: 	template, ok := codeInterpreter["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["template"].(map[string]interface{})
117: 	if !ok {
118: 		return nil, api.ErrTemplateMissing
119: 	}
120: 
121: 	if err := applyCodeInterpreterTemplate(sandbox, template); err != nil {
122: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to apply template: %w", err)
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	labels := sandbox.GetLabels()
126: 	if labels == nil {
127: 		labels = make(map[string]string)
128: 	}
129: 	labels[SessionIdLabelKey] = sessionID
130: 	labels[WorkloadNameLabelKey] = req.Name
131: 	labels[WorkloadNamespaceLabelKey] = req.Namespace
132: 	labels[WorkloadKindLabelKey] = types.CodeInterpreterKind
133: 	sandbox.SetLabels(labels)
134: 
135: 	annotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
136: 	if annotations == nil {
137: 		annotations = make(map[string]string)
138: 	}
139: 	now := time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
140: 	annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey] = now
141: 
142: 	sessionTimeout := DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout
143: 	if timeout, ok := codeInterpreter["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["sessionTimeout"].(string); ok && timeout != "" {
144: 		if d, err := time.ParseDuration(timeout); err == nil {
145: 			sessionTimeout = d
146: 		}
147: 	}
148: 	annotations[IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey] = sessionTimeout.String()
149: 
150: 	expiresAt := time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL)
151: 	annotations[ExpiresAtAnnotationKey] = expiresAt.Format(time.RFC3339)
152: 	sandbox.SetAnnotations(annotations)
153: 
154: 	created, err := s.k8sClient.CreateSandbox(ctx, req.Namespace, sandbox.Object)
155: 	if err != nil {
156: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create sandbox: %w", err)
157: 	}
158: 
159: 	klog.InfoS("Created sandbox for CodeInterpreter", "sandbox", sandboxName, "sessionID", sessionID)
160: 
161: 	sandboxID := ""
162: 	if uid, ok := created["metadata"].(map[string]interface{})["uid"].(string); ok {
163: 		sandboxID = uid
164: 	}
165: 
166: 	entryPoints := extractCodeInterpreterEntryPoints(codeInterpreter)
167: 
168: 	return &types.SandboxInfo{
169: 		Kind:             types.CodeInterpreterKind,
170: 		SandboxID:        sandboxID,
171: 		SandboxNamespace: req.Namespace,
172: 		Name:             sandboxName,
173: 		EntryPoints:      entryPoints,
174: 		SessionID:        sessionID,
175: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
176: 		ExpiresAt:        expiresAt,
177: 		Status:           "Pending",
178: 	}, nil
179: }

181: func generateSandboxName(sessionID string) string {
182: 	return "sandbox-" + sessionID[:8]
183: }
184: 
185: func buildSandboxObject(name, namespace, sessionID, workloadName, workloadKind string) *unstructured.Unstructured {
186: 	return &unstructured.Unstructured{
187: 		Object: map[string]interface{}{
188: 			"apiVersion": "agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1",
189: 			"kind":       "Sandbox",
190: 			"metadata": map[string]interface{}{
191: 				"name":      name,
192: 				"namespace": namespace,
193: 				"labels": map[string]interface{}{
194: 					SessionIdLabelKey:         sessionID,
195: 					WorkloadNameLabelKey:      workloadName,
196: 					WorkloadNamespaceLabelKey: namespace,
197: 					WorkloadKindLabelKey:      workloadKind,
198: 				},
199: 			},
200: 			"spec": map[string]interface{}{
201: 				"template": map[string]interface{}{
202: 					"spec": map[string]interface{}{
203: 						"containers": []interface{}{},
204: 					},
205: 				},
206: 			},
207: 		},
208: 	}
209: }
210: 
211: func applyTemplateToSandbox(sandbox *unstructured.Unstructured, template map[string]interface{}) error {
212: 	spec, ok := template["spec"].(map[string]interface{})
213: 	if !ok {
214: 		return fmt.Errorf("template missing spec")
215: 	}
216: 
217: 	sandboxSpec, ok := sandbox.Object["spec"].(map[string]interface{})
218: 	if !ok {
219: 		sandboxSpec = make(map[string]interface{})
220: 		sandbox.Object["spec"] = sandboxSpec
221: 	}
222: 
223: 	sandboxSpec["template"] = map[string]interface{}{
224: 		"spec": spec,
225: 	}
226: 
227: 	if labels, ok := template["labels"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
228: 		sandboxLabels := sandbox.GetLabels()
229: 		if sandboxLabels == nil {
230: 			sandboxLabels = make(map[string]string)
231: 		}
232: 		for k, v := range labels {
233: 			if vs, ok := v.(string); ok {
234: 				sandboxLabels[k] = vs
235: 			}
236: 		}
237: 		sandbox.SetLabels(sandboxLabels)
238: 	}
239: 
240: 	if annotations, ok := template["annotations"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
241: 		sandboxAnnotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
242: 		if sandboxAnnotations == nil {
243: 			sandboxAnnotations = make(map[string]string)
244: 		}
245: 		for k, v := range annotations {
246: 			if vs, ok := v.(string); ok {
247: 				sandboxAnnotations[k] = vs
248: 			}
249: 		}
250: 		sandbox.SetAnnotations(sandboxAnnotations)
251: 	}
252: 
253: 	return nil
254: }
255: 
256: func applyCodeInterpreterTemplate(sandbox *unstructured.Unstructured, template map[string]interface{}) error {
257: 	sandboxSpec, ok := sandbox.Object["spec"].(map[string]interface{})
258: 	if !ok {
259: 		sandboxSpec = make(map[string]interface{})
260: 		sandbox.Object["spec"] = sandboxSpec
261: 	}
262: 
263: 	podSpec := map[string]interface{}{
264: 		"containers": []interface{}{
265: 			map[string]interface{}{
266: 				"name":  "main",
267: 				"image": template["image"],
268: 			},
269: 		},
270: 	}
271: 
272: 	if image, ok := template["image"].(string); ok {
273: 		podSpec["containers"].([]interface{})[0].(map[string]interface{})["image"] = image
274: 	}
275: 
276: 	if command, ok := template["command"].([]interface{}); ok {
277: 		podSpec["containers"].([]interface{})[0].(map[string]interface{})["command"] = command
278: 	}
279: 
280: 	if args, ok := template["args"].([]interface{}); ok {
281: 		podSpec["containers"].([]interface{})[0].(map[string]interface{})["args"] = args
282: 	}
283: 
284: 	if env, ok := template["environment"].([]interface{}); ok {
285: 		podSpec["containers"].([]interface{})[0].(map[string]interface{})["env"] = env
286: 	}
287: 
288: 	if resources, ok := template["resources"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
289: 		podSpec["containers"].([]interface{})[0].(map[string]interface{})["resources"] = resources
290: 	}
291: 
292: 	sandboxSpec["template"] = map[string]interface{}{
293: 		"spec": podSpec,
294: 	}
295: 
296: 	if labels, ok := template["labels"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
297: 		sandboxLabels := sandbox.GetLabels()
298: 		if sandboxLabels == nil {
299: 			sandboxLabels = make(map[string]string)
300: 		}
301: 		for k, v := range labels {
302: 			if vs, ok := v.(string); ok {
303: 				sandboxLabels[k] = vs
304: 			}
305: 		}
306: 		sandbox.SetLabels(sandboxLabels)
307: 	}
308: 
309: 	if annotations, ok := template["annotations"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
310: 		sandboxAnnotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
311: 		if sandboxAnnotations == nil {
312: 			sandboxAnnotations = make(map[string]string)
313: 		}
314: 		for k, v := range annotations {
315: 			if vs, ok := v.(string); ok {
316: 				sandboxAnnotations[k] = vs
317: 			}
318: 		}
319: 		sandbox.SetAnnotations(sandboxAnnotations)
320: 	}
321: 
322: 	return nil
323: }
324: 
325: func extractEntryPoints(agentRuntime map[string]interface{}) []types.SandboxEntryPoint {
326: 	ports, ok := agentRuntime["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["targetPort"].([]interface{})
327: 	if !ok {
328: 		return nil
329: 	}
330: 
331: 	entryPoints := make([]types.SandboxEntryPoint, 0, len(ports))
332: 	for _, p := range ports {
333: 		port, ok := p.(map[string]interface{})
334: 		if !ok {
335: 			continue
336: 		}
337: 
338: 		ep := types.SandboxEntryPoint{}
339: 		if pathPrefix, ok := port["pathPrefix"].(string); ok {
340: 			ep.Path = pathPrefix
341: 		}
342: 		if protocol, ok := port["protocol"].(string); ok {
343: 			ep.Protocol = protocol
344: 		}
345: 		if portNum, ok := port["port"].(int64); ok {
346: 			ep.Endpoint = fmt.Sprintf(":%d", portNum)
347: 		}
348: 
349: 		entryPoints = append(entryPoints, ep)
350: 	}
351: 
352: 	return entryPoints
353: }
354: 
355: func extractCodeInterpreterEntryPoints(codeInterpreter map[string]interface{}) []types.SandboxEntryPoint {
356: 	ports, ok := codeInterpreter["spec"].(map[string]interface{})["ports"].([]interface{})
357: 	if !ok {
358: 		return []types.SandboxEntryPoint{
359: 			{Path: "/", Protocol: "HTTP", Endpoint: ":8080"},
360: 		}
361: 	}
362: 
363: 	entryPoints := make([]types.SandboxEntryPoint, 0, len(ports))
364: 	for _, p := range ports {
365: 		port, ok := p.(map[string]interface{})
366: 		if !ok {
367: 			continue
368: 		}
369: 
370: 		ep := types.SandboxEntryPoint{}
371: 		if pathPrefix, ok := port["pathPrefix"].(string); ok {
372: 			ep.Path = pathPrefix
373: 		}
374: 		if protocol, ok := port["protocol"].(string); ok {
375: 			ep.Protocol = protocol
376: 		}
377: 		if portNum, ok := port["port"].(int64); ok {
378: 			ep.Endpoint = fmt.Sprintf(":%d", portNum)
379: 		}
380: 
381: 		entryPoints = append(entryPoints, ep)
382: 	}
383: 
384: 	if len(entryPoints) == 0 {
385: 		return []types.SandboxEntryPoint{
386: 			{Path: "/", Protocol: "HTTP", Endpoint: ":8080"},
387: 		}
388: 	}
389: 
390: 	return entryPoints
391: }
